title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Jet Freight Logistics

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Jet Freight Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Jet Freight Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Pune location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Jet Freight Logistics:
Jet Freight Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jet Freight Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
